news.t: Franklin Templeton Expands Digital Asset Exposure in Franklin Crypto Index ETF (EZPZ)
Franklin Templeton rolls out “EZPZ” Bitcoin and Ether ETF
Franklin Templeton Expands Its Digital Asset ETP Suite With Launch of the Franklin Crypto Index ETF

overview.description: The Franklin Crypto Index ETF (EZPZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long cryptocurrency basket, short usd currency. The fund tracks a cryptocurrency index, offering exposure to leading digital assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum. The fund aims to reflect the performance of a key segment of the crypto market EZPZ was launched on Feb 20, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: CF Institutional Digital Asset Index - US - Settlement Price
